title: The Day I Learned I'm an Obliger

content.setup: I used to beat myself up constantly. I could help everyone else with their goals, but I'd completely fail at my own. I thought I was broken.
content.development: Then I learned about the Four Tendencies. Turns out, I'm an Obliger - I meet outer expectations easily but struggle with inner ones. It's not a flaw, it's just how I'm wired. About 40% of people are like me!
content.turning_point: The moment I stopped trying to rely on willpower and started building external accountability? Everything changed. I told my friend I'd text her every morning after my workout. Now I never miss - because I can't let HER down.
content.lesson: Knowing your tendency isn't an excuse. It's a strategy. I stopped fighting my nature and started working WITH it.
content.application: If you keep crushing it for others but failing for yourself, you might be an Obliger too. The answer isn't more discipline - it's external accountability.
